# [![Image 3: SA.AL&CO](https://www.saaland.co/cdn/shop/files/Saal_plain_logo_165x.png?v=1613770842)](https://saaland.co/)

[](https://saaland.co/account)[](https://saaland.co/search)[](https://saaland.co/cart)

## AN AUSTRIAN FAMILY COMPANY

**Our mission is to create innovative, natural, and sustainable skincare products.**Launched 10 years ago, we evolved into a family company as our own family grew. Dr. Charlotte Laszloffy leads the family business since 2022 and developed it become a completely unique Austrian skincare brand. As of today, our 12 products are sold in 400+ stores worldwide.

**We partner with one of the most innovative natural skincare producers in the Alpine region**, exclusively focused on and pushing the boundaries of natural skincare. The production happens at the foot of the Ötztal glacier, using alpine spring water as a mineral-rich basis for all products. Our natural formulations achieve the highest standards and are certified natural, vegan, cruelty-free, and GMO-free.

**As a family company, our commitment to sustainability is sincere.**We primarily choose local ingredients and source our packaging from regional producers with a high commitment to sustainability. Our signature aluminum tubes and bottles are made from 99% recycled raw materials and are 100% recyclable.

![Image 4](https://www.saaland.co/cdn/shop/files/Austrian_skincare_SA.AL_CO_400x.jpg?v=1738576510%20400w)
